indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for prolonged computer use.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The layout is not designed for focused solo work, as it lacks a dedicated workspace.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no task lighting to reduce eye strain and provide good visibility for screen work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for computer work (solo). There is no flat personal work surface, no ergonomic seating, no dedicated workspace layout, and no task lighting. The presence of a bathtub and a window view of nature suggests a leisurely environment rather than a focused work area.
